1.summary: Initial scaffolding: HTML/CSS/JS structure, canvas, basic gate rendering

2.summary: Gate drag-drop, wire drawing, circuit simulation engine

3.summary: Truth table display, level system, 5 tutorial levels

4.summary: Star rating, level select screen, localStorage progress

5.summary: Visual polish: breadboard aesthetic, IC chip gates, LED glow

7.summary: Signal animation, confetti celebration, sound effects

8.summary: Challenge mode, random truth table generator, difficulty slider

9.summary: Sandbox mode, leaderboard, mobile touch support

10.summary: Undo/redo, keyboard shortcuts, wire deletion improvements

11.summary: Ambient soundscape, gate symbols, intro screen

12.summary: How-to-play modal, achievement system, daily challenges

13.summary: Share functionality, colorblind mode, responsive improvements

14.summary: Pin hover highlights, compatible pin indicators, wire color coding

15.summary: Gate count indicator, bezier wires, wire colors, row micro-celebrations, DPI fix

16.summary: Levels 11-15, chapter 3, bridge levels, multi-output support

17.summary: Levels 16-17, half adder, full adder, 14-dimension expert review

18.summary: P0 batch: onboarding tooltips, quick-test, collapsible truth table, hint system, post-solve insights

19.summary: P0 batch 2: skip/bookmark, gate placement animation + ripple, star-scaled celebrations, drag ghost, confirm modal

20.summary: P0 batch 3: narrative layer, chapter completion modal, tiered achievements, timer improvements, audio escalation, challenge generator overhaul, tension overlay, wire deletion particles, hint visual highlights

21.summary: Juice & Polish: breadboard sparkle, celebration particles overhaul, failure screen shake, truth table checkmarks, ambient music pad

22.summary: Gameplay Review + Fixes: 10-metric gameplay review, victory flash, run tension ramp, celebration canvas, level card stars fix

23.summary: Content Architecture: Gate Encyclopedia, Stats Dashboard, Milestone Celebrations, Level Difficulty Labels

24.summary: Audio Engine & Replay Systems: effects chain (reverb+compressor), gate-specific sound signatures, wire pitch escalation, progressive wire reveal, breadboard reactivity, gate-colored glow, auto-save mid-puzzle, Pure Logic badge (no hint penalty), par benchmarks, replay ghost overlay

25.summary: Visual Identity & Interaction Polish: color-coded toolbox gates, brand mark SVG, pin visibility improved, font size toggle, non-blocking onboarding, semantic wire colors, clear circuit undo, level transition choreography, sound micro-randomization, challenge mode gating

26.summary: Onboarding & Reward Systems: distributed onboarding (L1–4), idle wire animation, staggered star reveal + chime, RUN button press depth, grid snap overlay, UI navigation sounds, timer color thresholds, daily streak with freeze tokens, Circuit Journey graduation modal, Perfect Retry button

27.summary: Systems Integration & Hardening: cross-level references, intentional zoom transitions, unified modal language, intensity-scaled failure shake, level select scroll restore, first-action timer start, cycle detection warning, mobile haptics, enhanced Master Logician graduation screen, tighter gate budgets
